transcript: Speaker A: Hello. [Hello.] Speaker B: हेलो. [Hello.] Speaker A: अरे... हाऊ आर... हाऊ आर... सॉरी. [Are... how are... how are... sorry.] Speaker B: अरे नाही नाही चालतं. मला पण इंग्लिश मराठी मिक्स होतं सगळं. तू एक काम कर असं बोल, "How are you?". [Oh no, it's fine. Even my English and Marathi get mixed up. Do one thing, say it like this, "How are you?".] Speaker A: How are you? थँक्यू नेहा. पण तुमची इंग्लिश तर चांगली असेल ना? [How are you? Thank you Neha. But your English must be good, right?] Speaker B: नाही, मी पण इथेच बेसिक शिकलीये. आता ॲडव्हान्स लेव्हलला चाललीये. [No, I also learned basic here. Now I'm moving to advanced level.] Speaker A: असं का? मग कशी सुधारली तुमची इंग्लिश? [Is it? Then how did your English improve?] Speaker B: असंच की! लोकांशी इथे MySivi ॲपवर इंग्लिशमध्ये गप्पा मारते आणि होते इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस. [Just like this! I chat with people here on MySivi app in English and get English practice.] Speaker C (Voiceover): MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 Rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Diya, Kiran. ...practice for an average of 8 minutes/call. 28:14 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. MySivi AI English Speaking. MySivi Premium ₹1. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: A Marathi-speaking man hesitates to speak English during a call, and a female peer reassures him and explains how she improved her English using the MySivi app. The ad highlights that over 1 crore users practice on the app and offers a trial for just ₹1.
